title: Shudehill Giftware Woodland Robin Ceramic Oil Burner Rustic House-Shaped Wax Melt Burner with Robin Design Home Family Friends Mum Nan (Friends)
features: Charming Ceramic Design: House-shaped oil burner with robin motif and heartfelt quote.
Multiple Sentiments: Choose from Home, Family, Friends, Mum, Nan, or Best Friends designs.
Perfect Size: Measures 12.5 cm (H) x 10 cm (W) x 10 cm (D).
Functional & Decorative: Use with wax melts or essential oils for a cozy atmosphere.
Gift Ready: A thoughtful present for loved ones and home décor enthusiasts.
Rustic Finish: Adds countryside charm to any living space.
description: Create a warm and inviting atmosphere with the Woodland Robin Oil Burner Collection, a charming range of ceramic burners designed to fill your home with soothing fragrance. Each burner is crafted in a rustic house shape and features a delicate robin motif alongside a heartfelt message, making it both functional and decorative. Perfect for use with essential oils or wax melts, these burners are ideal for adding a touch of countryside charm to any room. Designs Available: Home – “Bless this home with love and laughter” Family – “Where life begins and love never ends” Friends – “Friends are the family we choose” Mum – “Mum makes a house a home” Nan – “Nan brings warmth and love” Best Friends – “Best friends make life beautiful” Features: Material: High-quality ceramic with rustic finish Dimensions: Height 12.5 cm x Width 10 cm x Depth 10 cm Function: Suitable for wax melts or essential oils (tealight not included) Perfect Gift: Ideal for birthdays, housewarming, or festive occasions Easy to Use: Back opening for tealight and top dish for fragrance
